title: mentha × caerulea
intro: Mentha × caerulea, commonly known as blue mint, is a hybrid mint plant that is a cross between the watermint (Mentha aquatica) and the spearmint (Mentha spicata). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate headaches. The health benefits of Mentha × caerulea include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and reduce stress levels. The herbal preparations of blue mint include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to soothe sore muscles, calm digestive issues, and promote a sense of well-being.
